scope.included: candidate parent paths evaluated by a future, separately frozen H0-E successor
excluded: the frozen H0-E-v2 E1a panel and artifacts

material_exclusion: unphysical near-contact after periodic minimum-image evaluation
space-group assignment unstable across the preregistered tolerance panel
path_quarantine: parent reconstruction exceeds the preregistered displacement or strain domain
projected parent fails strict parent-space-group reidentification
projected parent fails the preregistered StructureMatcher certificate
assignment does not define the complete parent permutation group action

path_quarantine.reason: The source crystal is numerically and crystallographically valid, but all three observed SG12-to-SG71 embeddings fail the frozen StructureMatcher certificate and require a source Hencky strain far outside the frozen parent-path domain.
path_quarantine.source: frozen H0-E-v2 E1a failure localization plus post-archive read-only source audit
